# P7_Capstone_JIBS — Submission Package

**Target journal:** Journal of International Business Studies (JIBS, Palgrave Macmillan)
**Build date:** 2026-05-21
**Status:** ✅ Ready for blind-review submission

## Files

| File | Format | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `P7_Capstone_JIBS_manuscript_EN.docx` | DOCX | Primary submission upload |
| `P7_Capstone_JIBS_manuscript_EN.pdf` | PDF | Preview |
| `P7_Capstone_JIBS_manuscript_EN.tex` | LaTeX | Source for journals accepting LaTeX |
| `P7_Capstone_JIBS_manuscript_VN.docx` | DOCX | Vietnamese version (CTU thesis dossier + reference) |
| `P7_Capstone_JIBS_manuscript_VN.pdf` | PDF | Vietnamese preview |
| `COVER_LETTER_TEMPLATE.md` | Markdown | Fill in name + institution + reviewers |

## Compliance checklist

- [x] Abstract: 5-component IMRaD (Purpose / Design / Findings / Originality)
- [x] No citations inside abstract
- [x] JEL Classification codes + 5-6 Keywords
- [x] APA 7th references with DOI links
- [x] Blind review: author names withheld
- [x] No NotebookLM or non-academic citations
- [x] No § / ¶ / prose arrows (LaTeX special chars in tables OK)
- [x] Em-dash count reduced per humanizer skill
- [x] All inline citations have references entries (and vice versa)
- [x] LaTeX builds clean: 0 errors, 0 missing-character warnings
